{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Arelius family Underlord
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Daishou]] knows the truth about the [[Arelius family Underlord]]'s [[pure madra]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c21">''Blackflame'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
